reviews.comment:
Los baños en general estan regular, la atencion en playa es lenta, el es carisimo y la atencion es regular

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are generally okay, the service on the beach is slow, it's very expensive and the service is mediocre

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Un lugar estratégico para gasolinera y bien atendido sí sos socio del ACA tenés descuentos y sino es un poco caro son rápidos y mucho lugar de estacionamiento

(Translated by Google)
A strategic location for a gas station, and the service is good; if you're an ACA member you get discounts, otherwise it's a bit expensive, but they're fast and there's plenty of parking.

reviews.comment:
Atencion rapida y con todos los sercicios de automovil club, incluso registro de conduccion internacional. Los tostados de la cafeteria son muy buenos.

(Translated by Google)
Fast service and all the Auto Club services, including an international driver's license. The coffee shop's coffees are very good.
